creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
Dear Zhang

Thank you for reporting your problem to us.

Sadly, the information you provided is very limited, and can therefor =
not be resolved as is.
I noticed that you were trying to upgrade to a current that is over a =
month old, and I would
like to ask you to test a more recent version.

Do realise that since it's HEAD it is prone to having bugs and possibly =
not booting etc
(eventhough we try our best to make sure that doesn't happen) and asks =
additional support
from you to resolve potential problems.

It would also be interesting to see a verbose boot from a working =
machine (that is available
because you are able to initiate the upgrade in the first place) and =
possibly a devinfo -v
or something.

Thanks,
Remko

--=20
/"\   Best regards,                        | remko@FreeBSD.org
